title: michael9r9r's RPG Loot (modern port)
description: This is michael9r9r's "RPG Loot" data pack, working in 1.21.9 and later, with a few minor tweaks.
body:
This is a port of michael9r9r's "RPG Loot, Mobs & Dungeons Data Pack" updated to modern versions of the game. The original pack (from 1.14 to 1.19) can be found [HERE](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/rpg-loot-data-pack/).

I have made a few minor tweaks of my own, including making the custom spawners a bit more discreet (rather than having a visible, spinning armor stand inside them; not the most immersive sight in a dungeon).

I have obtained permission from michael9r9r to upload these updated packs. His Discord server is the one linked on this Modrinth page.

If there are any errors or bugs that you notice, please find me on the Discord server (@TheSenate) and let me know.
